title: Pan Seared Mushroom Tart
description: A savory tart filled with sautéed mushrooms and a hint of earthy flavor. Perfect as a side dish or light lunch.

ingredients.name: brazilian
ingredients.notes: diced brazilian cheese (such as queijo minas)

instructions: Roll out the tart sheet and place on a baking sheet.
In a pan, heat the earl grey tea-infused olive oil over medium heat.
Add the mushrooms and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Stir in the chopped wood sorrel leaves and cook for an additional minute.
Sprinkle the diced brazilian cheese and dried thyme over the mushroom mixture.
Pour the mixture over the tart sheet, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the tart up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
